hypothesis: Augmenting training with synthetic spectra that model pairwise interaction-induced nonlinearities (e.g., hydrogen-bonded complexes) and adding a dual-component spectral reconstruction loss will increase Top-10 accuracy by at least 10 percentage points over the current aligned multitask baseline on ATR-IR binary mixtures of strong H-bond donors/acceptors when the target constitutes 10–30% of the mixture.
